name: Eggs in Green Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Fresh herbs (e.g., dill, chives, parsley)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise, sour cream, and lemon juice in a bowl.
2. Add finely chopped hard-cooked egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Season with salt, pepper, and sugar.
4. Thoroughly rinse the herbs, pat them dry, and chop finely.
5. Mix the herbs into the sauce.
6. Slice the remaining hard-cooked eggs in half and arrange on top of the sauce. Serve.
